title: Threat Hunting Report
scenario: Write a threat hunting report for a suspicious network traffic anomaly. The report should include a summary of the anomaly, analysis of the threat, recommended countermeasures, and a conclusion. The report should be written in a technical tone and be no more than 3 pages in length. Assume the anomaly was detected by a behavioral-based intrusion detection system.
constraints: Use a standard threat hunting report template
Include at least 3 technical details about the anomaly

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the report adhere to a standard threat hunting report template?
Are at least 3 technical details about the anomaly included?
Is the report written in a formal technical tone?
